center.name: Northeast Africa
center.summary: Northeast Africa是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Golden-breasted starling，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is distributed in Northeastern Africa, from Somalia, Ethiopia, Kenya and northern Tanzania. These birds inhabit the grassland, savannah, the thickets of acacias, dry-thorn forests and shrubland. thumb|240px|left| At Bird Kingdom, Niagara Falls, Canada
